subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the heaven of the Divine Will as a grace from God, the Lord of the worlds, to draw all servants unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من سماء المشیته فضلا من لدی الله رب العالمین لیجذب العباد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
